label: volve_15_9_F_15A_eikonal_1D
scope_notes: Eikonal forward via FMM on a 25 m cell grid; the lateral-translation-symmetry trick exploits Vp(z) being laterally uniform to need one FMM solve per ensemble member.
Nonlinear Gauss-Newton inversion: 3 GN iterations per member with lambda bisected on the trial-step RMS each iteration.

Compared to phase 3 (straight-ray, RMS median 174 ms, sonic-inside 11.1%, holdout 0%), the eikonal forward is expected to reduce the systematic bias from straight-line path lengths; see phase 4 holdout for the calibration result.
